id.description: The unique identifier of the serverless application.

name.description: The name of the serverless application.

required_capabilities.description: A set of capabilities that are required by the application.

semantic_version.description: The version of the application using semantic versioning.

source_code_url.description: The URL to the source code of the application.

template_url.description: The URL to the application’s CloudFormation template.
